RULING:ARGUED and the Court TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.PARTIES TO SUBMIT RESPECTIVE ORDERS.(302/REQ/CL-EX)BELDON YEE # 2647

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Judgment to Quiet Title hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Scott David Kalkin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jose Portillo, present and Maria Portillo, appearance waived, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendants: George Chang, Jenny Chang and The Asian American Cultural Center.
Proposed Judgment received in court, and matter is under submission.

July 30, 2004
Judgment granted in the amount of $50,000.00, with interest at the legal rate and costs of suit according to proof. Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
